gist.headline: The daily chronicle
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot just updated the README with the latest news and community apps. The hive's history is secure.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to reflect the latest news and recently added community apps.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository's front page fresh with the latest community creations and project updates.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot updating a giant book or notice board, representing the automated README update. Polly the bee helping out.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning new pixelated polaroids to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pinning new pixelated polaroids to a wooden notice board. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny thumbtack. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
